categories.name: Edible Oils
categories.description: Pure & natural oils cold-pressed for superior taste and nutrition

categories.name: Besan
categories.description: Stone-ground gram flour for authentic Indian cooking

categories.name: Atta
categories.description: Whole wheat chakki atta for soft, nutritious rotis

categories.name: Maida
categories.description: Finely milled refined flour for baking and cooking

categories.name: Poha
categories.description: Light, flattened rice flakes for quick and healthy meals

categories.name: Sooji
categories.description: Premium semolina for halwa, upma, and traditional sweets

categories.name: Pulses
categories.description: Protein-rich lentils and legumes, cleaned and ready to cook

categories.name: Detergent Bar
categories.description: Powerful stain-fighting bars for long-lasting fabric care

products.name: Mustard Oil Kachi Ghani
products.description: Extracted through the traditional cold-press (Kachi Ghani) method, this mustard oil retains its natural pungency, golden colour, and full nutritional profile. Ideal for pickles, stir-fries, and authentic North Indian cooking.
highlights: Rich in Omega-3 & Omega-6 fatty acids
Zero trans fats, no artificial additives

products.name: Soyabeen Oil
products.description: A light, neutral-tasting oil refined from soybeans. With a high smoke point and a balanced fatty acid profile, it is a versatile kitchen essential for frying, baking, and salad dressings.
highlights: High smoke point — great for frying
Good source of Vitamin E & K

products.name: Til Oil
products.description: Pressed from roasted sesame seeds, this oil carries a rich, nutty aroma that elevates stir-fries, marinades, and traditional recipes. A staple in South Indian and Asian kitchens.
highlights: Deep nutty aroma from roasted seeds

products.name: Barik Besan
products.description: Ultra-fine chickpea flour ground from premium chana dal. Its smooth texture makes it the go-to choice for crispy pakodas, silky gravies, and ladoo. Consistently uniform grain with no grit.

products.name: Mota Besan
products.description: Coarsely ground chickpea flour with a rustic, earthy texture. Preferred for making thick, textured batters for bhajia and boondi, as well as traditional Rajasthani gatte.

products.name: Kadhi Pakoda Besan
products.description: Specially blended besan with the perfect coarseness to create fluffy, light pakodas that hold their shape in kadhi. Formulated to give thick, glossy kadhi with superior binding.

products.name: Super Fine Dhokla Special
products.description: A super-fine, sifted besan formulated specifically for steamed Gujarati dhokla. It ferments evenly, giving dhokla that is spongy, light, and perfectly porous with every batch.

products.name: Moti Choor Besan
products.description: A medium-coarse, specially processed besan for making the tiny, melt-in-mouth boondi used in moti choor ladoo. Creates perfectly round, even boondi with a delicate crunch.
highlights: Low moisture for longer shelf life
Ideal for moti choor & boondi ladoo

products.name: MP Chakki Atta
products.description: Stone-ground whole wheat atta sourced from the fertile Madhya Pradesh wheat belt — known for producing India's finest sharbati wheat. Slow chakki milling preserves the bran, germ, and natural wheat flavour for soft, nutritious rotis.
highlights: Sharbati wheat from MP wheat belt
Soft rotis with no added maida

products.name: Maida
products.description: Finely milled, bleached refined flour with a super-smooth texture. An essential ingredient for bakery products, parathas, naan, samosa wrappers, and a wide range of Indian sweets.

products.name: Poha
products.description: Medium-thick flattened rice flakes that are light, easy to cook, and naturally gluten-free. Soaks in minutes for classic poha breakfast, chivda, or as a binding agent in tikkis and kebabs.

products.name: Sooji
products.description: Coarsely ground durum wheat semolina with a slightly grainy texture and a nutty aroma when toasted. The foundation of halwa, upma, suji roti, and countless Indian sweet preparations.
highlights: Toasts to a rich, nutty aroma

products.name: Pulses
products.description: A curated selection of premium-grade lentils and legumes, machine-cleaned and double-sorted to remove impurities. Packed fresh to retain natural colour, flavour, and maximum nutritional value.

products.name: Oxy Boom Detergent Bar
products.description: Oxy Boom's active oxygen formula penetrates deep into fabric fibres to lift stubborn stains — from grease and mud to food and ink — in a single scrub. Gentle on hands, tough on stains.
highlights: Long-lasting bar — more washes per bar

products.name: Sky Active Detergent Bar
products.description: Sky Active combines a powerful surfactant blend with a fresh fragrance to remove everyday dirt, sweat stains, and odours. Leaves clothes visibly brighter and smelling clean for longer.
